title: CCPA/CPRA — Cross-Context Behavioral Advertising — Household Device Graph Linking Without Aggregated Opt-Out Propagation

compliance.assurance_rationale: Auto-migrated from cat-22 markdown on Phase 1.3 run, then normalised in Phase A (clause 'unspecified' → '§1798.120'). Requires SME review to confirm clause accuracy, mode (satisfies vs detects-violation-of), and assurance level (contributing/partial/full).

dataSources: `index=id` `sourcetype="graph:edge"` (household_id, device_a, device_b, created_ts, consent_version); `index=privacy` `sourcetype="consent:state"` (device_id, sale_opt_out, updated_ts)
app: Identity graph vendor logs via HEC
spl:
index=privacy sourcetype="consent:state" sale_opt_out=true earliest=-30d
| eval eff=strptime(updated_ts,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
| rename device_id as device_a
| join type=left device_a [
    search index=id sourcetype="graph:edge" earliest=-30d
    | eval ct=strptime(created_ts,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ")
    | fields household_id, device_a, device_b, ct, consent_version
  ]
| lookup household_consent_floor.csv household_id OUTPUT min_consent_version as required_consent_version
| where ct>eff AND consent_version!=required_consent_version
| table household_id, device_a, device_b, ct, consent_version, required_consent_version
value: Household-level graphs can undermine individual opt-outs if not synchronized. Monitoring graph edges created linking a opted-out device to new cookies without a refreshed household consent record evidences governance gaps in cross-device advertising.
implementation: (1) Maintain `household_consent_floor.csv` (household_id, min_consent_version) updated when household policies change; (2) pseudonymize `household_id`; (3) vendor SLA for propagation latency; (4) legal defines household scope; (5) integrate with periodic reconciliation job.
visualization: Table (edges), Network graph optional restricted, Single value (count).
knownFalsePositives: Administrative tasks, scheduled jobs or platform updates can match this pattern — correlate with change management, maintenance windows and user role before raising severity.
